{{Quote|Odd.|Evan Chan, regarding a suspicious R2 unit|<ref name="YDR" />}}
'''Evan Chan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was employed as an [[environmental hydrographer]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. His job required him to travel to different [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in order to evaluate the condition of their bodies of [[Water/Legends|water]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Chan was preparing for a lengthy off-world trip at the [[Chancellor Palpatine Spaceport]] on the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] planet, by drinking [[SomnaSkol Red]], an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage, inside the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport's]] [[Refresher/Legends|refresher]]. He witnessed the unusual way [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], disguised as an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]], evaded another such [[Unidentified R2 unit (Chancellor Palpatine Spaceport)|unit]] working as security detail for the spaceport.

==Biography==
Evan Chan was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked and was granted a certification under the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as an [[environmental hydrographer]].<ref name="YDR" /> Part of his job responsibilities included evaluating the condition of the bodies of [[Water/Legends|water]] on different [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. Although his work meant that he had to travel to many worlds in order to analyze the quality of [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]], [[river]]s, and [[lake]]s across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Chan was uncomfortable at the prospect of extra-[[Star/Legends|solar]] travel via [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] due to his religious beliefs. Additionally, the thought of his molecules and atoms being twisted made him physically nauseous.<ref name="YDR" />

[[File:Yoda_Episode_I_Canon.png|thumb|right|300px|Jedi Master Yoda (pictured) was seen by Chan while disguised as an R2 unit.]]
Sometime in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> Chan was at the [[Chancellor Palpatine Spaceport]], awaiting passage from the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to his latest assignment. Having lost [[Sleep/Legends|sleep]] in the past three [[Standard day/Legends|days]] due to what he believed was a longer than usual travel [[Time/Legends|time]], Chan braced himself for the ordeal by drinking [[SomnaSkol Red]], an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage, inside the men's [[Refresher/Legends|refresher]]. While he was inspecting his appearance in the mirror, Chan witnessed a strange [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] with no markings enter the room, [[Telekinesis/Legends|float]] in the air, and trap the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport's]] security [[Unidentified R2 unit (Chancellor Palpatine Spaceport)|R2 unit]]—which had been trailing it—inside one of the stalls.<ref name="YDR" />

The odd R2 unit was actually [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] in disguise for a secret [[Mission to Vjun (Clone Wars)|mission]] to bring [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] back into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Believing the SomnaSkol Red was making him see things, Chan poured the remaining contents of his drink from his hip [[Flask/Legends|flask]] into the sink and swore off that particular brand of alcohol.<ref name="YDR" />

==Personality and traits==
Chan had major qualms about hyperspace travel due to his spirituality. The idea of his atoms and molecules being warped in order to travel long distances made him physically uneasy, causing him to feel sick to his [[Stomach/Legends|stomach]] and experience nausea.<ref name="YDR" />

==Equipment==
Chan owned a hip flask that he considered invaluable.<ref name="YDR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Evan Chan was created by author [[Sean Stewart]] for his [[2004]] novel, ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''.<ref name="YDR" />
